restaurants.name: Samarkand Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: One of the city's most popular restaurants, offering a lively atmosphere with music and a wide selection of traditional Uzbek dishes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Platan Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A refined dining spot known for its elegant garden terrace and relaxed ambiance. The restaurant offers a mix of Uzbek and international cuisine
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Old City Restaurant Samarkand
restaurants.ambience: A charming restaurant close to the historic center of Samarkand, offering traditional Uzbek dishes in a cozy setting with views of the old city atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Bibikhanum Teahouse
restaurants.ambience: A traditional teahouse with relaxed atmosphere and authentic, with shaded seating and views of the historic surroundings
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Cafe Magistr
restaurants.ambience: A casual café popular among locals and travelers for quick bites and coffee
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Boulevard Restaurant & Bakery
restaurants.ambience: A modern bakery-style café offering a variety of pastries and light café meals
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Karimbek Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A well-known restaurant offering authentic Uzbek cuisine in a spacious and welcoming setting. It's popular for its generous portions and traditional flavors
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Emirhan Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A stylish restaurant offering a mix of Uzbek and European cuisine, known for its modern décor and relaxed atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Labi Ghor Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A popular restaurant known for its lively atmosphere and diverse menu featuring Uzbek and Central Asian specialties
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Registan Square
attractions.description: Often described as one of the most beautiful public squares in the world, Registan Square was the heart of the Timurid Empire
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Gur-e-Amir Mausoleum
attractions.description: The final resting place of Amir Temur, the powerful conqueror who established the Timurid Empire in the 14th century
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Ulugh Beg Observatory
attractions.description: Built in the 15th century by Ulugh Beg, grandson of Amir Temur and one of the greatest astronomers of his time
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Shah-i-Zinda Necropolis
attractions.description: One of the most breathtaking sites in Uzbekistan, Shah-i-Zinda is a stunning avenue of mausoleums decorated with dazzling blue tiles
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Siyob Bozori (Siyob Bazaar)
attractions.description: Located near the Registan area, Siyob Bazaar is the largest traditional market in Samarkand
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

hotels.name: Samaria Hotel Samarkand
hotels._source_file: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx
